metadata.description: Azure region for all resources.
Short project prefix used in all resource names.
6-char unique suffix derived from RG id — do not override unless needed.
Azure AI Foundry Orchestrator agent ID. Update after running agents/create_agents.py --update.
Azure AI Foundry Research agent ID. Update after running agents/create_agents.py --update.
Azure AI Foundry Document agent ID. Update after running agents/create_agents.py --update.
TPM capacity for text-embedding-3-small (in thousands). Default 50K.
TPM capacity for gpt-4o (in thousands). Default 150K.
Azure region for the Static Web App.
Resource tags.
Name for the Static Web App resource.
SKU tier: Free or Standard.
Deployment token for GitHub Actions / swa-cli.
Default hostname of the Static Web App.
Resource name.
Free_F1 for dev/demo; Standard_S1 for production.
Short env+suffix prefix used for resource names, e.g. "sentinel-intel-dev"
6-char unique suffix derived from RG id.
Log Analytics workspace name (in the same RG) for container logs.
ACR name (in the same RG) for pulling MCP images.
Cosmos DB account name (in the same RG).  Used to resolve keys.
Database name inside the Cosmos DB account.
AI Search service name (in the same RG).  Used to resolve admin key.
Azure AI Search endpoint URL, e.g. https://srch-xxx.search.windows.net
Azure OpenAI account name (in the same RG).  Used to resolve API key.
Azure OpenAI endpoint URL.
Embedding deployment name.
Image tag for mcp-sentinel-db container.  Defaults to placeholder.
Image tag for mcp-sentinel-search container.  Defaults to placeholder.
Image tag for mcp-qms container.  Defaults to placeholder.
Image tag for mcp-cmms container.  Defaults to placeholder.
